case_title: G.E. CAPITAL CORP./MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP. VS MARTINEZ, BIENVENIDO I.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $972.40 FILED BY G.E. CAPITAL CORP./MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, BIENVENIDO I. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, BIENVENIDO I.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF G.E. CAPITAL CORP./MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, BIENVENIDO I. $972.40 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,014.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $34.17 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, BIENVENIDO I.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, BIENVENIDO I.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $426.20 AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, BIENVENIDO I.
